action_set_definitions.name: get_facility_coordinates
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the [x, y] coordinates for a named facility station (e.g., 'STATION_NORTH', 'P&D_STATION').

station_name.description: The name of the station to locate.

action_set_definitions.name: query_robot_state
action_set_definitions.description: Returns the current location and battery percentage of the specified robot.

action_set_definitions.name: query_item_position
action_set_definitions.description: Locates the storage coordinates for a specific order or item.

item_id.description: The ID of the item or order (e.g., 'ITEM_A').

action_set_definitions.name: inspect_bin_status
action_set_definitions.description: Checks if a specific bin coordinate is obstructed by obstacles.

action_set_definitions.name: calculate_power_requirement
action_set_definitions.description: Calculates if the robot has enough battery to reach a target destination and then return to a safety station (P&D), including a safety margin.

action_set_definitions.name: move_robot
action_set_definitions.description: Commands the robot to move to specified coordinates.

action_set_definitions.name: handle_load
action_set_definitions.description: Performs a pick-up or drop-off action at the robot's current location.

action_set_definitions.name: execute_handshake
action_set_definitions.description: Performs the mandatory system handshake/charging protocol at the P&D station.

state_description.warehouse_grid: Dimensions and layout of the warehouse, including obstacle locations.
state_description.robots: List of active Autonomous Guided Vehicles (AGVs) and their current status.
state_description.inventory_bins: Mapping of bin coordinates to stored item details.
state_description.pending_orders: Queue of retrieval tasks currently assigned to the system.
state_description.time_step: Current logical time step of the simulation.
